Septic System
Inspections

Thorough septic inspections and certifications for home buyers, sellers, realtors, and routine maintenance — Johnson County and North Texas.

📞 Call Now
Inspections & Certifications

Know Exactly What
You're Working With

Whether you're buying a home, listing a property, or just want peace of mind, a professional septic inspection is one of the smartest investments you can make. Direct Pumping provides detailed, honest assessments — written reports included.

  • 🏡
    Pre-Purchase Inspections — Buying a property with a septic system? Know its condition before you close. We identify issues that could cost thousands after the sale.
  • 📄
    Pre-Listing Certifications — Sellers and realtors trust us for fast, accurate certifications that keep transactions on track and buyers confident.
  • 🔄
    Routine Maintenance Inspections — Annual or bi-annual inspections to catch small issues before they become expensive emergencies.
  • ⚠️
    Problem Diagnosis — Slow drains, odors, soggy yard? We'll inspect and diagnose the root cause and give you clear options.

What Our
Inspection Covers

  • ✓
    Tank condition — cracks, structural integrity, lid condition
  • ✓
    Inlet & outlet baffle inspection
  • ✓
    Scum and sludge level measurement
  • ✓
    Distribution box and drain field condition
  • ✓
    Signs of system failure or stress
  • ✓
    Aerobic system components (if applicable)
  • ✓
    Written report with findings and recommendations
For Realtors

We Keep Your
Deals on Track

Real estate professionals across North Texas rely on Direct Pumping for fast turnarounds, clear written reports, and communication that keeps transactions moving. We understand closing timelines matter.

  • 📅
    Fast scheduling — typically within 48 hours
  • 📋
    Written reports delivered promptly after inspection
  • 📞
    Direct communication — you can reach us when it matters
  • 🤝
    Preferred referral relationships available for active agents
Contact Us for Realtor Scheduling

Why Inspections Matter in North Texas

Many properties in Johnson County and surrounding rural areas rely entirely on septic systems. With expanding development and aging infrastructure, knowing the condition of a system before a transaction — or before a problem develops — protects your investment and your family.

Aerobic System Inspections

Aerobic Treatment Units (ATUs) require specialized inspection. Our team is experienced with aerobic systems common throughout North Texas and can assess all components including air pumps, spray heads, and control panels.

Schedule Your Inspection Today

Fast turnaround. Written reports. Honest findings. Serving Johnson County & North Texas.
